resources.name: Linear Design System Community Root
notes: Use this root node when validating the newer Linear Design System community file through the repo-native bridge.
Prefer doctor + fetch via URL or registry before falling back to Figma MCP.
If api.figma.com is unreachable or the token path is blocked, use the Desktop plugin fallback and preserve the resulting raw manifest for provenance.

resources.name: Linear UI Community Copy
notes: Use the local Figma bridge instead of Figma MCP.
The file should be opened in Figma Desktop before export.
Paste the full URL into the plugin target field to export the exact node.
This is a card-scale reference, not a page-scale UI audit target.

resources.name: Linear UI Community Page
notes: Use this page-scale reference when auditing overall shell, hierarchy, and panel density.
The page title in Figma is Design - UI Kit.
Use the local Figma bridge instead of Figma MCP.

resources.name: Linear UI Community Settings Shell
notes: Primary page-shell reference for settings-style layouts.
Use for sidebar plus content-pane proportion, contrast, and spacing.

resources.name: Linear UI Community Settings Sidebar
notes: Primary sidebar-shell reference.
Use for translucent dark rail, 1px border, and nav density.

resources.name: Linear UI Community Settings Content Pane
notes: Primary content-pane reference for section grouping and header hierarchy.
Use for review and home dashboard shell alignment.

resources.name: Linear UI Community Theme Setting Row
notes: Primary setting-row reference with label, description, and trailing value chip.
Use for section row spacing and divider treatment.

resources.name: Linear UI Community Translucent UI Row
notes: Reference row for translucency guidance.
This row contains the explicit product rule for transparent sidebar and modal surfaces.

resources.name: Linear UI Community Theme Value Chip
notes: Reference chip for low-noise pills and value capsules.
Use for badge fill, radius, and label density.

resources.name: Linear UI Community Sidebar Selected Item
notes: Reference selected-nav item for compact rails and selected states.
Use for sidebar row height, radius, and muted emphasis.

resources.name: Linear Design System Community Dark Mode Page
notes: Use this page-scale dark mode reference for token audit, inventory, and shell-level review.
Do not use this CANVAS export for direct codegen or promotion; capture a smaller child component or component set first.
The free-path default should be local bridge or REST fetch plus the production workflow gate, not repeated MCP reads.
